<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="wUfQmTgySQfJjvCFJ-2V"> <mxGraphModel dx="2542" dy="1629" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TB

%% ==========================================================
%% USERS
%% ==========================================================

subgraph USERS[\"Users\"]
 SA([Super Admin / Admin])
 TPO([TPO Officer])
 COORD([Coordinator])
 HOD([HOD / Dean])
end

%% ==========================================================
%% API LAYER (MOUNTED)
%% ==========================================================

subgraph MOUNTED[\"REST API — Mounted in server.js\"]
 AUTH[Auth Module<br/>/auth<br/>7 endpoints]
 C360[Company360 Module<br/>/api/company360<br/>8 endpoints]
 ANALYTICS[Analytics Module<br/>/analytics<br/>1 endpoint]
end

subgraph MIDDLEWARE[\"Middleware\"]
 JWT[JWT Authentication]
 ADMIN[Admin Role Gate]
end

SA -->|Login| AUTH
TPO -->|Login| AUTH
COORD -->|Login| AUTH
HOD -->|Login| AUTH

AUTH --> JWT
C360 --> JWT
ANALYTICS --> JWT

JWT --> ADMIN

%% ==========================================================
%% CONTROLLERS NOT YET MOUNTED
%% ==========================================================

subgraph UNMOUNTED[\"Controllers Available (not yet wired)\"]
 ALUMNI_CTRL[Alumni Controller<br/>18 endpoints]
 MOU_CTRL[MoU Controller<br/>11 endpoints]
 DEAL_CTRL[DealPipeline Controller]
 OUTREACH_CTRL[Outreach Controller]
 EMP_CTRL[Employment Controller]
end

%% ==========================================================
%% SERVICE LAYER
%% ==========================================================

subgraph SERVICES[\"Service Layer (all built)\"]
 C360SVC[Company360Service]
 ALUMNI_SVC[AlumniService]
 DEAL_SVC[DealPipelineService]
 MOU_SVC[MoUService]
 OUTREACH_SVC[OutreachService]
 EMP_SVC[EmploymentService]
 ANALYTICS_SVC[AnalyticsService]
end

C360 --> C360SVC
ANALYTICS --> ANALYTICS_SVC
ALUMNI_CTRL --> ALUMNI_SVC
MOU_CTRL --> MOU_SVC
DEAL_CTRL --> DEAL_SVC
OUTREACH_CTRL --> OUTREACH_SVC
EMP_CTRL --> EMP_SVC

%% ==========================================================
%% DATABASE
%% ==========================================================

subgraph DATABASE[\"Persistent Storage\"]
 PG[(PostgreSQL<br/>Supabase)]
 PRISMA[Prisma ORM<br/>7 models]
end

C360SVC --> PRISMA
ALUMNI_SVC --> PRISMA
DEAL_SVC --> PRISMA
MOU_SVC --> PRISMA
OUTREACH_SVC --> PRISMA
EMP_SVC --> PRISMA
ANALYTICS_SVC --> PRISMA

PRISMA --> PG

%% ==========================================================
%% EXTERNAL SERVICES
%% ==========================================================

SMTP[(SMTP Email Gateway<br/>Nodemailer)]

AUTH -->|Send OTP| SMTP

%% ==========================================================
%% DEFERRED TO V2
%% ==========================================================

subgraph DEFERRED[\"Deferred to V2\"]
 UI[React PWA / Next.js Frontend]
 MATCH[Rule-Based Matching Engine]
 HEALTH[Health Score Calculation]
 BULK[Async Bulk Email Queue]
 JOB[Job → Application → Offer Pipeline]
 PORT[Live Portfolio Showcase]
 FEEDBACK[Recruiter Feedback Module]
end

UI -.->|Not built| AUTH
UI -.->|Not built| C360
UI -.->|Not built| ANALYTICS
